examples: "There's a new development," he said soberly.
Tom sat still and contemplated him soberly a moment.
She saw Ellis, soberly dressed in a well-cut dark suit.
Meanwhile, they soberly present sponsors with statistical evidence that just the opposite is true.
The only soberly dressed characters are the superb, at-first-innocent Figaro (Vito Priante) and the he's-met-his-match Susanna (Lydia Teuscher).
